name: html-testrunner

metadata.name: html-testRunner
metadata.summary: A Test Runner in python, for Human Readable HTML Reports

documentation:
# HtmlTestRunner

```{image} https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/html-testRunner.svg
:target: https://pypi.python.org/pypi/html-testRunner
```

```{image} https://img.shields.io/travis/oldani/HtmlTestRunner.svg
:target: https://travis-ci.org/oldani/HtmlTestRunner
```

HtmlTest runner is a unittest test runner that save test results
in Html files, for human readable presentation of results.

This Package was inspired in `unittest-xml-reporting` and
`HtmlTestRunner by tungwaiyip`.

## Usage:

```python
import HtmlTestRunner
import unittest


class TestStringMethods(unittest.TestCase):

    def test_upper(self):
        self.assertEqual('foo'.upper(), 'FOO')

    def test_error(self):
        """ This test should be marked as error one. """
        raise ValueError

    def test_fail(self):
        """ This test should fail. """
        self.assertEqual(1, 2)

    @unittest.skip("This is a skipped test.")
    def test_skip(self):
        """ This test should be skipped. """
        pass

if __name__ == '__main__':
    unittest.main(testRunner=HtmlTestRunner.HTMLTestRunner(output='example_dir'))
```

As simple as import the class an initialize it, it only have one request
parameter that is output, this one is use to place the report in a sub
direcotry in `reports` directory.

## Links:

- [Github](https://github.com/oldani/HtmlTestRunner)

documentation: -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

classes.name: HtmlTestRunner.runner.HTMLTestRunner

methods.name: HtmlTestRunner.runner.HTMLTestRunner._make_result
documentation:
Create a TestResult object which will be used to store
information about the executed tests.

methods.name: HtmlTestRunner.runner.HTMLTestRunner.run
documentation: Runs the given testcase or testsuite.
" A test runner class that output the results.

functions.name: HtmlTestRunner.result.load_template
documentation:
Try to read a file from a given path, if file
does not exist, load default one.

functions.name: HtmlTestRunner.result.strip_module_names
documentation:
Examine all given test case names and strip them the minimal
names needed to distinguish each. This prevents cases where test
cases housed in different files but with the same names cause clashes.

classes.name: HtmlTestRunner.result._TestInfo
documentation: " Keeps information about the execution of a test method.

classes.name: HtmlTestRunner.result.HtmlTestResult

methods.name: HtmlTestRunner.result.HtmlTestResult._prepare_callback
documentation:
Appends a 'info class' to the given target list and sets a
callback method to be called by stopTest method.

methods.name: HtmlTestRunner.result.HtmlTestResult.getDescription
documentation: Return the test description if not have test name.

methods.name: HtmlTestRunner.result.HtmlTestResult.startTest
documentation: Called before execute each method.

methods.name: HtmlTestRunner.result.HtmlTestResult.stopTest
documentation: Called after excute each test method.

methods.name: HtmlTestRunner.result.HtmlTestResult.addSuccess
documentation: Called when a test executes successfully.

methods.name: HtmlTestRunner.result.HtmlTestResult.addFailure
documentation: Called when a test method fails.

methods.name: HtmlTestRunner.result.HtmlTestResult.addError
documentation: " Called when a test method raises an error.

methods.name: HtmlTestRunner.result.HtmlTestResult.addSubTest
documentation: Called when a subTest completes.

methods.name: HtmlTestRunner.result.HtmlTestResult.addSkip
documentation: " Called when a test method was skipped.

methods.name: HtmlTestRunner.result.HtmlTestResult.printErrorList
documentation: Writes information about the FAIL or ERROR to the stream.

methods.name: HtmlTestRunner.result.HtmlTestResult._get_info_by_testcase
documentation: Organize test results by TestCase module.

methods.name: HtmlTestRunner.result.HtmlTestResult._format_duration
documentation: Format the elapsed time in seconds, or milliseconds if the duration is less than 1 second.

methods.name: HtmlTestRunner.result.HtmlTestResult.get_results_summary
documentation: Create a summary of the outcomes of all given tests.

methods.name: HtmlTestRunner.result.HtmlTestResult._get_report_summaries
documentation: Generate headers and summaries for all given test cases.

methods.name: HtmlTestRunner.result.HtmlTestResult.generate_reports
documentation: Generate report(s) for all given test cases that have been run.

methods.name: HtmlTestRunner.result.HtmlTestResult.generate_file
documentation: Generate the report file in the given path.

methods.name: HtmlTestRunner.result.HtmlTestResult._exc_info_to_string
documentation: Converts a sys.exc_info()-style tuple of values into a string.
A test result class that express test results in Html.
